parameters: \n<Yurasa>Pretty smart, waiting for the surprise attack there.
\n<Elovia>I'm no robot biologist, but if I didn't know better I'd say LUCI was trying to make something very big using these machines.

\n<Elovia>Is this Arc-Tec's true purpose?\. A factory?
\n<Yurasa>I hope this isn't the case, but it's entirely possible what we've seen so far just scratches the surface.

\n<Yurasa>I hope this isn't the case, but it's entirely possible what we've seen so far just scratches the surface.
\n<Yurasa>LUCI's taking apart the factory, I s'pose.
\n<Yurasa>And I don't think it's because he cares about the environment.

\n<Elovia>But I still feel...\.\. sort of connected to them?
\n<Yurasa>No, I get what you're saying.\.\. Some sort of weird feeling, huh? Same here.

\n<Elovia>I... suppose it could be used for playing tennis with, if you want.
